title: Two-Factor Authentication Enabled!
subtitle: Now let's set up backup options so you can always get back into your account, even if you lose access to your {{method}}.

setup_recovery.title: Set Up Account Recovery
setup_recovery.description: We'll create backup codes for your account and optionally set up a backup email address.

backup_codes.title: Backup Codes (Required)
backup_codes.description: We'll create backup codes that you can use to get back into your account if you lose access to your {{method}}. Each code can only be used once.

backup_email.label: Backup Email (Optional)
backup_email.help_text: If provided, you'll receive a verification email to confirm this backup email address.
